title: Appendix D: Assessment and diagnosis of FASD among adults: a national and international systematic review – Pre-assessment checklist - Canada.ca
content:
## Appendix D: Assessment and diagnosis of FASD among adults: a national and international systematic review – Pre-assessment checklist

## Appendix D: Pre-Assessment Checklist
Source: Dewane, Scott, & Brems (2005, p. 46)
For readers interested in the PDF version, the document is available for downloading or viewing:
Appendix D: Pre-Assessment Checklist (PDF document - 53.99 KB - 1 page)
- Receive referrals through a single point of entry system
- Utilize a standardized referral form
- Provide client or caregiver with a letter explaining purpose and process of diagnostic team
- Determine eligibility of client
- Prioritize client list
- Inform referral sources in a timely manner of outcome of screening process
- Provide an explanation and referral alternatives to ineligible clients
- Determine eligibility of client
- Prioritize client list
- Inform referral sources in a timely manner of outcome of screening process
- Provide an explanation and referral alternatives to ineligible clients
- Secure signed release of information forms
- Use telephone, fax, or mail for making request
- Learn the most effective way to request records from different facilities
- Remember that gathering information from other agencies will improve the diagnostic
- For more information, contact the Division of Childhood and Adolescence
